moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships are in their final week, with the Men's and Ladies' Singles Finals approaching on July 12.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: It's finals week at Wimbledon! Who are you backing to lift the trophies on Centre Court this weekend?

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: The buzz is electric across London as Wimbledon reaches its climax. Are you heading to SW19 or watching from home?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Quarter-Finals
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 heats up with quarter-final matches taking place from July 9-11, including England vs Norway on July 11.

angles.name: Quarter-Final Excitement
angles.copy: World Cup Quarter-Finals are here! Huge games coming up, especially England vs Norway on Saturday. Who's making it to the semis?

angles.name: Tournament Talk
angles.copy: The World Cup is down to the final eight! Every match is do or die now. What's been the moment of the tournament for you so far?

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival kicks off in Moseley Park, Birmingham, from July 10-12, featuring a diverse line-up.

angles.name: Birmingham Beats
angles.copy: Birmingham's Moseley Park is about to get grooving! Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival starts Friday. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Weekend Vibe
angles.copy: Get ready for a soulful weekend! Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival is bringing the good vibes to Birmingham. What's your favourite jazz/funk track?

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival London
moments.blurb: Kaleidoscope Festival returns to Alexandra Palace Park, London, on July 11 for a day of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Ally Pally Party
angles.copy: Alexandra Palace Park is hosting Kaleidoscope Festival this Saturday! Who's ready for a day of amazing music and views over London?

angles.name: Festival Lineup
angles.copy: Live music, comedy, and stunning scenery – Kaleidoscope Festival is happening in London this weekend. What's your must-see act?

moments.title: The Open Championship Practice Days
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins its practice days from July 12-15 at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, leading up to the main tournament.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Returns
angles.copy: The Open Championship practice days start Sunday at Royal Birkdale! Get ready for golf's oldest major. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Merseyside Golf
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is gearing up for The Open! Practice rounds begin this weekend. Excitement building for the 154th Championship.

moments.title: Trying Season 5 Premieres
moments.blurb: The fifth season of the heartwarming comedy series 'Trying', starring Rafe Spall and Esther Smith, premieres today on Apple TV.

angles.name: New Season Drop
angles.copy: Grab the tissues and get ready to laugh! Trying Season 5 is out today on Apple TV. Who's binging the new episodes?

angles.name: British Comedy Back
angles.copy: Nikki and Jason are back! The highly anticipated fifth season of British comedy 'Trying' drops today. Perfect for your evening watch.

moments.title: Little House on the Prairie New Series
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of the classic 'Little House on the Prairie' series, based on Laura Ingalls Wilder's books, premieres tomorrow on Netflix.

angles.name: Nostalgia Trip
angles.copy: Get ready for a trip back to the American West! A new 'Little House on the Prairie' series arrives on Netflix tomorrow. Are you watching?

angles.name: Family Drama
angles.copy: A beloved classic reimagined! The new 'Little House on the Prairie' series promises sweeping landscapes and timeless family drama, hitting Netflix tomorrow.

moments.title: The Dark Premieres on ITV
moments.blurb: A new gripping detective thriller, 'The Dark', based on G.R. Halliday's novel, premieres on ITV on Sunday, July 12.

angles.name: New Sunday Thriller
angles.copy: Your next Sunday night obsession? New detective thriller 'The Dark' starts this weekend on ITV. Get ready for twists and turns!

angles.name: Gripping Drama
angles.copy: If you love a good mystery, mark your calendars! 'The Dark' brings a gripping new drama to ITV this Sunday. Who's tuning in?

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK After the Altar S2
moments.blurb: Season 2 of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar', catching up with the cast post-pods, premieres on Netflix on Sunday, July 12.

angles.name: Reality TV Catch Up
angles.copy: The pods are back! Well, kind of. 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 drops Sunday on Netflix. What drama are you expecting?

angles.name: Post-Pod Gossip
angles.copy: Who's still together? Who's broken up? All the post-pod gossip from 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 is coming to Netflix this Sunday!

moments.title: Happy 56th to Beck
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter and multi-instrumentalist Beck, known for his experimental rock and alternative sound, turns 56 today.

angles.name: Beck's Day
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the one and only Beck! From 'Loser' to 'Dreams', what's your favourite track from the genre-bending artist?

angles.name: Musical Maverick
angles.copy: Celebrating the musical maverick, Beck, who turns 56 today! His influence on alternative music is undeniable. Which album is your go-to?

moments.title: Happy 28th to Jaden Smith
moments.blurb: American rapper, singer, and actor Jaden Smith celebrates his 28th birthday today.

angles.name: Jaden's Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 28th Birthday to Jaden Smith! Rapper, actor, and all-round creative. What's your favourite Jaden track or film?

moments.title: Happy 33rd to Perrie Edwards
moments.blurb: Perrie Edwards, member of the hugely successful British girl group Little Mix, celebrates her 33rd birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Little Mix Star
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating Perrie Edwards from Little Mix turning 33! What's your favourite Little Mix hit?

moments.title: Happy 46th to Jessica Simpson
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and businesswoman Jessica Simpson turns 46 on Friday.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Throwback to the 00s! Happy 46th Birthday on Friday to pop icon Jessica Simpson. What's your top track from her?

moments.title: Happy 72nd to Neil Tennant
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, lead singer of the iconic British synth-pop duo Pet Shop Boys, celebrates his 72nd birthday on Friday.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Legend
angles.copy: It's Neil Tennant's 72nd birthday on Friday! Celebrate the Pet Shop Boys frontman – what's your favourite track from the synth-pop legends?

moments.title: Happy 69th to Peter Murphy
moments.blurb: Peter Murphy, the influential lead singer of the pioneering goth rock band Bauhaus, celebrates his 69th birthday on Saturday.

angles.name: Goth Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a Happy 69th Birthday to Peter Murphy of Bauhaus on Saturday! The Godfather of Goth still commands the stage. What's your favourite Bauhaus track?

moments.title: Happy 84th to Roger McGuinn
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, co-founder and lead guitarist of the legendary folk-rock band The Byrds, turns 84 on Monday.

angles.name: Folk Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday on Monday to Roger McGuinn of The Byrds! A true folk-rock pioneer. What's your most loved Byrds song?

moments.title: Happy 48th to Will Champion
moments.blurb: Coldplay drummer Will Champion celebrates his 48th birthday on Monday.

angles.name: Coldplay Drummer
angles.copy: Wishing a Happy 48th Birthday to Coldplay's Will Champion on Monday! The rhythmic heart of one of the world's biggest bands. What's your favourite Coldplay track?

moments.title: Happy 39th to Dan Reynolds
moments.blurb: Dan Reynolds, lead singer of the Grammy-winning band Imagine Dragons, turns 39 on Tuesday.

angles.name: Imagine Dragons Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 39th Birthday to Imagine Dragons frontman Dan Reynolds on Tuesday! From 'Radioactive' to 'Believer', what's your top track from the band?

moments.title: Happy 80th to Linda Ronstadt
moments.blurb: Legendary singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice across rock, country, and pop, celebrates her 80th birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 80th Birthday to the iconic Linda Ronstadt on Wednesday! A true legend across genres. What's your favourite of her many hits?

moments.title: Happy 70th to Joe Satriani
moments.blurb: Virtuoso guitarist Joe Satriani, renowned for his instrumental rock prowess, celebrates his 70th birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to the incredible Joe Satriani on Wednesday! The guitar god who inspires generations. What's your favourite Satch track?

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are finishing for the summer holidays this week, marking the start of the long break for students and families.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Many students across the UK are finishing up this week. What are your big plans for the long break?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially here for many families! Wishing everyone a fantastic and relaxing break. What's your favourite summer activity?
